race.comment: Six-year-old mare LOVE YOU ANYWAY (7) has found one better at her last five starts, the latest over this trip at Muswellbrook when she closed well to be beaten under a length. Now 17 starts into her maiden prep and still performing - sure to shed the maiden tag soon and this might be her day. KIWI HARMONY (14) is a new arrival in the Neil Godbolt stable. Form around the Riverina over longer trips in recent times has been steady. Best figures measure up favourably so worth considering despite a seven-week let-up. RIVER BISCOTTE (4) is back from a five-month spell and has performed well when fresh in the past. Twice a placegetter here and handles the going so he ticks a few boxes. MORTARMAN (2) is a first starter who was with Bjorn Baker but has arrived in the Alicia Willick since his latest trial on 5 March. Hard one to line up so let the betting tell the story. ANOTHER BLING (18) has minor claims only.
